posting.sourceTitle: Plumbers & Steamfitters LU #22 JAC of Western NY
posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee for Plumbers & Steamfitters, Local Union #22
posting.locationSummary: Finger Lakes and Western New York
posting.applicationSummary: Obtain applications in person at Local Union #22 in West Seneca on the first Tuesday of each month during the recruitment period, then return them by mail or in person.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Plumbers & Steamfitters, Local Union #22, 120 Gardenville Parkway, West Seneca, NY 14224
posting.applicationMailingAddress: Plumbers & Steamfitters, Local Union #22, 120 Gardenville Parkway, West Seneca, NY 14224
posting.applicationHours: 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. on the first Tuesday of each month, excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must reside in Cattaraugus, Chautauqua, Erie, Niagara, or Wyoming Counties; in Genesee County, the townships of Alabama, Oakfield, Elba, Pembroke, Batavia, Darien, or Alexander; in Orleans County, the townships of Yates, Ridgeway, or Shelby; or in Allegany County, the townships of Allen, Alma, Amity, Angelica, Belfast, Bolivar, Caneadea, Centerville, Clarksville, Cuba, Friendship, Genesee, Granger, Hume, New Hudson, Rushford, Scio, or Wirt.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have a valid NYS driver’s license and reliable transportation to job sites and required classes.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass a drug test at the expense of the sponsor after selection and prior to enrollment.
posting.classRequirement: Must be able to attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma (such as TASC or GED).
Must provide a signed statement from own personal physician attesting he/she can physically perform the duties of a Plumber.
Must possess a valid NYS driver’s license in order to operate company vehicles.
Must have reliable means of transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
Must have residency in Cattaraugus, Chautauqua, Erie, Niagara, or Wyoming Counties.
In Genesee County, must reside in the townships of Alabama, Oakfield, Elba, Pembroke, Batavia, Darien, or Alexander.
In Orleans County, must reside in the townships of Yates, Ridgeway, or Shelby.

In Allegany County, must reside in the townships of Allen, Alma, Amity, Angelica, Belfast, Bolivar, Caneadea, Centerville, Clarksville, Cuba, Friendship, Genesee, Granger, Hume, New Hudson, Rushford, Scio, or Wirt.
Must pass a drug test, at the expense of the sponsor, after selection and prior to enrollment in the apprenticeship program.

Must take and pass Work Keys Applied Mathematics, Workplace Documents, and Graphic Literacy Assessment tests with a minimum score of four (out of seven) in each category to be selected for an interview.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be 18 or older, have a high school diploma or equivalency, meet the residency rules, have a valid NYS driver’s license and reliable transportation, pass a drug test, and score at least 4 on required Work Keys assessments.
posting.contactSummary: For further information, contact Plumbers & Steamfitters, Local Union #22 at (716) 668-8500.
